text.title: Client Conventions Intake Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes intake artefact by dimension coverage → mismatch resolution → sign-off. Branches name observable report features.

decision-tree.root-question: Are prerequisites satisfied: repo access, contact_email, engagement ≥ 4 weeks?

branch.question: Are all mismatches resolved (resolution non-empty for each)?
Is signoff.signed_by a client-side named human AND signed_at present?

text.example: prereqs_met=true → all 8 dimensions sourced → no mismatches → signed_by=lead@acme.com 2026-05-23 → verdict=commit-record (ref run-the-checklist).
